title: Scape and Run: Parasites Extra
body:
Addon for the mod [Scape and Run: Parasites](https://modrinth.com/mod/scapeandrunparasites), adding more parasite variations, several parasite-related items, and some features that are not available in the original.

![Hijacked Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40b8fdc291ced81376faf96958c6237f4e82c757.png)

## **New Parasites:**
- Assimilated Evoker
- Assimilated Ocelot
- Assimilated Ocelot Head
- Assimilated Vindicator
- Assimilated Vindicator Head
- Assimilated Witch
- Assimilated Witch Head
- Hijacked Creeper
- Hijacked Creeper Head
- Hijacked Skeleton
- Hijacked Stray
- Hijacked Skeleton Head
- Feral Adventurer (WIP)
- Feral Ocelot
- Feral Witch (WIP, disable by default)
- Feral Wolf
- Aqua Gore
- Aqua Remain
- Swimming Flesh
- Wendigo
- Primitive Stalker
- Adapted Stalker
- Adapted Tozoon
- Adapted Vermin


## **Functionality:**
- **Custom Spawn System:** Integrates with SRP Phase Spawn (works together) to control parasite spawning through SRPExtra. Configuration options include biome, biome type, dimension, distance to nodes or colonies, and specific spawn points with support for enabling aquatic parasite spawns.
- **Additional Biome & Dimension Checks (Works only for SRP Phase Spawn):** Set specific biomes and dimensions where certain parasites can spawn, along with an evolution phase where these restrictions no longer apply.
- **Custom Structure Spawning:** Add new or existing structures that can spawn in specific dimensions, biomes, or parasite evolution phases. Structure customization includes:
  - Multiple generation methods
  - Choosing which entities can spawn within the structure
  - The ability to generate a whole array of structures at once


## **SRPExtra Chat Commands:**
- /srpextra help   - Help command.
- /srpextra info <reg_name>  - Display brief information about the parasite.
- /srpextra phase_list <phase (optional)> <dim_id(optional)>   - Displays a list of parasites that will spawn at specific evolution phases.

**SRP Phase Spawn:**
- /srpextra phase_srp spawn_status  - Display the current state of SRP Phase Spawn.
- /srpextra phase_srp spawn_off  - Disable SRP Phase Spawn.
- /srpextra phase_srp spawn_on  - Enable SRP Phase Spawn.
- /srpextra phase_srp list_add <phase> <reg_name> <min> <max> <weight>  - Add parasite to SRP spawn list.
- /srpextra phase_srp list_clear <phase (optional)>  - Clear SRP spawn list.
- /srpextra phase_srp list_info <phase (optional)>  - Display spawn lists from SRP Phase Spawn.
- /srpextra phase_srp list_remove <phase> <reg_name>  - Remove parasite from SRP spawn list.

**SRPE Phase Spawn:**
- /srpextra phase_srpe debug <true - false>  - Enable or disable debug mode for SRPExtra Phase Spawn (displays entity spawn coordinates and all rules that prevented a parasite from spawning).
- /srpextra phase_srpe spawn_status  - Display the current state of SRP Phase Spawn.
- /srpextra phase_srpe spawn_off  - Disable SRP Phase Spawn.
- /srpextra phase_srpe spawn_on  - Enable SRP Phase Spawn.
- /srpextra phase_srpe list_add <phase> <reg_name> <min> <max> <weight> <dim_id(optional)>  - Add parasite to SRPE spawn list.
- /srpextra phase_srpe list_clear <phase (optional)> <dim_id(optional)>  - Clear SRPE spawn list.
- /srpextra phase_srpe list_info <phase (optional)> <dim_id(optional)> - Display spawn lists from SRPE Phase Spawn.
- /srpextra phase_srpe list_remove <phase> <reg_name> <dim_id(optional)>   - Remove parasite from SRPE spawn list.


## **SRPStructures Chat Commands:**
- /srpstructures help   - Help command.
- /srpstructures dev debug   - Enables or disables structure spawn debugging.
- /srpstructures info <name>   - Displays detailed information about a structure's settings.
- /srpstructures list   - Displays a list of structures available for spawning.
- /srpstructures set <name> <posX (Optional)> <posZ (Optional)>   - Generates a structure at the selected coordinates or at the player's location (Y coordinate is determined automatically based on the generation method specified in the config file).

## **Future Plans:**
- Parasite Colonies: Allow parasites to gradually build their own colonies using structure files and configurable settings.
- New Parasite Types: Introduce more variations of parasites.
- Experiments with Parasites: Utilize parasite remains to create… (more details to come!)

**The addon can be customized in the config.**



**Help/Support/Suggestions:**

[Join Discord](https://discord.gg/peU9jS8rhA)
